widgets_values:
FLUX2 native face reference inpaint.

Detection only decides WHERE:
Load original image -> YOLO face bbox -> SAM refined face mask -> dilate/blur so cheeks, jaw, chin, and face width can change.

FLUX2 decides WHAT:
Original image latent + face mask -> SetLatentNoiseMask -> SamplerCustomAdvanced.
Prompt + original image reference + up to 3 face reference images -> ReferenceLatent chain -> FluxKontextMultiReferenceLatentMethod -> FluxGuidance.

Use face/head-focused references. Keep denoise low/medium for subtle detail correction; raise it if face width/fullness must move more. If using fewer than 3 face refs, bypass extra ReferenceLatent nodes or point them at the strongest reference image.

Replace the detected face with the person from the face reference images. Preserve the original photo composition, pose, hairstyle, hair length, outfit, background, lighting, and camera angle. Match the reference identity strongly: facial proportions, cheeks, jaw width, chin shape, face fullness, nose, eyes, lips, and skin texture. Natural expression, seamless edge blend, high quality.

identity mismatch with the face reference, changed hair, changed hairstyle, changed outfit, changed clothing, changed pose, changed camera angle, changed background, changed body, distorted face, melted skin, bad eyes, asymmetrical eyes, extra teeth, blurry face, harsh mask edge, visible seam

groups.title: FLUX2 model, prompt, and face references
